assumptions: The concept targets businesses in Suriname unless a narrower audience is supplied.
Placement dimensions, safe areas, eligibility, and overlays require current platform preview before publication.
Exact copy and the official Zenta logo will be added during final design production, not image prompting.

campaign.audience: owners of small and growing businesses in Suriname who need a clearer online presence

creative_strategy.audience_insight: Interest is fragile when visitors understand the offer but cannot see a simple path to ask a question.
creative_strategy.message_angle: A clear contact flow bridges information and conversation without promising conversion.
creative_strategy.hook: Do not leave interest without a next step.
creative_strategy.hypothesis: A physical bridge from service discovery to a warm conversation moment will clarify the role of WhatsApp integration.

format.crop_guidance: Keep the focal subject and reserved copy area inside the central composition with generous edge clearance.

visual_direction.subject: two refined visual islands representing service understanding and direct conversation
visual_direction.action: a single lime bridge unfolds between the website island and the contact island
visual_direction.environment: a minimal dark tabletop world with tactile architecture and a warm human-scale endpoint
visual_direction.composition: diagonal journey lower-left to upper-right, clean headline space upper-left, one unmistakable bridge
visual_direction.lighting: cool cyan discovery light transitioning to warm amber contact light along a lime path
visual_direction.style: tactile conceptual still life with restrained 3D depth and editorial clarity

copy.overlay_headline: Do not leave interest without a next step.
copy.caption: A strong website explains the offer and makes the next step easy. Zenta connects clear service pages with practical WhatsApp contact flows.

image_prompt: Create a polished 4:5 base image concept for a Zenta Creative paid ad image. The central subject is two refined visual islands representing service understanding and direct conversation. Show a single lime bridge unfolds between the website island and the contact island. Set the scene in a minimal dark tabletop world with tactile architecture and a warm human-scale endpoint. Composition: diagonal journey lower-left to upper-right, clean headline space upper-left, one unmistakable bridge. Lighting: cool cyan discovery light transitioning to warm amber contact light along a lime path. Visual style: tactile conceptual still life with restrained 3D depth and editorial clarity. Use Zenta's near-black foundation with the controlled palette #030507, #F4F7FB, #B9FF66, #5EE7FF, #9B7CFF; keep lime as the decisive action accent rather than flooding the image with one hue. The image must communicate the strategic angle 'A clear contact flow bridges information and conversation without promising conversion.' without claiming a result. Reserve clean, high-contrast negative space for the headline 'Do not leave interest without a next step.', support line 'Websites + Google visibility', and CTA 'Connect website to WhatsApp' to be typeset later by a designer. Do not render any words, letters, prices, logo, wordmark, platform mark, interface copy, or functional QR code inside the base image. Keep the focal subject and copy-safe space comfortably away from edges for placement preview. Avoid chat bubbles, WhatsApp logos, floating notification badges, or guaranteed-conversion language, fake evidence, visual clutter, and distorted objects or anatomy.
negative_constraints: no generated logo, wordmark, trademark, or third-party platform branding
no fabricated metrics, rankings, leads, revenue, testimonials, or guarantees
no copied Google, Meta, Facebook, Instagram, or WhatsApp interface
no tiny unreadable text, random letters, watermark, or signature
no stereotypes, unapproved likenesses, or identifiable private customer data
chat bubbles, WhatsApp logos, floating notification badges, or guaranteed-conversion language

accessibility.alt_text: A lime bridge connects a website service island to a warm contact destination.
accessibility.contrast_note: Typeset final copy in white or near-black on a solid high-contrast area and verify readability at mobile size.

required_review: Verify the website package and any stated price against the live Zenta website.
Confirm the base image contains no generated branding, fake proof, copied platform trade dress, or private data.
Preview final typography, logo placement, crop, and overlays in every intended placement.

production.typography_instruction: Add the exact overlay copy later using Zenta's bold modern geometric sans-serif system; do not ask an image model to typeset it.
production.logo_instruction: Reserve space for the approved Zenta logo and place the original brand asset only during final design production.
